core.name: Command Re-roll
core.effect: Re-roll one Hit roll, Wound roll, Damage roll, Saving Throw, or Advance/Charge roll.

core.name: Counter-offensive
core.timing: After an enemy unit has fought
core.effect: Select one eligible unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, or one that made a Charge move this turn. That unit fights next.

core.name: Grenade
core.timing: Before your unit is selected to shoot
core.effect: One model in the unit can, instead of shooting any of its weapons, make one attack with one Grenade weapon. That Grenade weapon's maximum range for this attack is 6". Only one Grenade can be used per battle round.

core.name: Epic Deed
core.timing: Before a CHARACTER model uses a Heroic Intervention ability
core.effect: That CHARACTER model can use one of the Heroic Intervention abilities listed on its datasheet, even if it is not normally able to use it this phase.

core.name: Insane Bravery
core.timing: Battle-shock step, before taking a Battle-shock test for a unit
core.effect: That unit automatically passes the Battle-shock test.

core.name: Rapid Ingress
core.timing: End of your opponent's Movement phase
core.effect: Set up one unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally from all enemy models.

imperium-space-marines.name: Adaptive Strategy
imperium-space-marines.effect: You can select a different Combat Doctrine from the one currently active for your army. That doctrine is active for your army until the end of the battle round.

imperium-space-marines.name: Hammer of Wrath
imperium-space-marines.timing: After a friendly unit makes a Charge move
imperium-space-marines.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

imperium-space-marines.name: Armour of Contempt
imperium-space-marines.timing: After an enemy unit selects a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit as a target
imperium-space-marines.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is made against that unit, worsen the AP of that attack by 1 (e.g. AP -2 becomes AP -1).

imperium-space-marines.name: Transhuman Physiology
imperium-space-marines.timing: Before an enemy makes an attack
imperium-space-marines.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets that unit, an unmodified Wound roll of 1-3 always fails.

imperium-space-marines.name: Wisdom of the Ancients
imperium-space-marines.effect: Select one Dreadnought or Ancient model from your army. Until the end of the turn, that model has the Leader ability. While a friendly unit is within 6" of that model, models in that unit can re-roll one Hit roll per attack.

imperium-space-marines.name: Only in Death Does Duty End
imperium-space-marines.timing: When a CHARACTER model is destroyed
imperium-space-marines.effect: That model can fight before it is removed from play. If that model is also a unit, the whole unit can fight before being removed.

imperium-blood-angels.name: Descent of Angels
imperium-blood-angels.timing: Your Movement phase, when a unit with Jump Pack arrives from Strategic Reserves
imperium-blood-angels.effect: That unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy models rather than the normal 9". That unit can also declare a charge this turn.

imperium-blood-angels.name: Red Thirst
imperium-blood-angels.timing: Fight phase, when a BLOOD ANGELS unit with Jump Pack is selected to fight
imperium-blood-angels.effect: Until end of phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons used by models in that unit.

imperium-blood-angels.name: Line Breaker
imperium-blood-angels.timing: Your Movement phase, when a LIBERATOR ASSAULT GROUP unit finishes a charge move
imperium-blood-angels.effect: Until end of turn, enemy units within Engagement Range of that unit are not Objective Secured.

imperium-blood-angels.name: Shock Assault
imperium-blood-angels.timing: Fight phase, when a unit from this detachment charges
imperium-blood-angels.effect: Until end of phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified hit roll of 6 scores 1 additional hit.

imperium-blood-angels.name: For the Chapter
imperium-blood-angels.timing: Any phase, when an ANGELIC INHERITORS CHARACTER model is destroyed
imperium-blood-angels.effect: Until end of battle, BLOOD ANGELS INFANTRY units within 6" of where that model was destroyed re-roll hit rolls of 1 in melee.

imperium-blood-angels.name: Sanguine Bond
imperium-blood-angels.timing: Fight phase, when a unit from this detachment is selected to fight
imperium-blood-angels.effect: Until end of phase, that unit has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

imperium-blood-angels.name: Rolling Thunder
imperium-blood-angels.timing: Your Shooting phase, when a BLOOD ANGELS VEHICLE unit is selected to shoot
imperium-blood-angels.effect: Until end of phase, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a hit roll of 1.

imperium-blood-angels.name: The Black Rage
imperium-blood-angels.timing: Fight phase, when a RAGE-CURSED ONSLAUGHT unit is selected to fight
imperium-blood-angels.effect: Until end of phase, that unit's OC characteristic is 0, but each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic and 1 to the Strength characteristic.

imperium-blood-angels.name: Armour of Contempt
imperium-blood-angels.timing: Any phase, when a saving throw is failed by a BLOOD ANGELS VEHICLE
imperium-blood-angels.effect: The AP of that attack is considered to be 0 for that saving throw. Re-roll the saving throw.

imperium-blood-angels.name: Gift of Foresight
imperium-blood-angels.effect: Select one BLOOD ANGELS unit. Until end of phase, each time an attack is made against that unit, subtract 1 from the hit roll.

imperium-dark-angels.name: Death to the Traitors!
imperium-dark-angels.timing: Before a unit is selected to shoot or fight
imperium-dark-angels.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack against a CHAOS unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

imperium-dark-angels.name: Stubborn Resistance
imperium-dark-angels.timing: When a unit fails a Battle-shock test
imperium-dark-angels.effect: That unit does not suffer the Battle-shocked penalty to its Objective Control until the end of your next turn.

imperium-dark-angels.name: Armour of Contempt
imperium-dark-angels.effect: Worsen the AP of those attacks by 1 until end of phase.

imperium-space-wolves.name: Savage Strikes
imperium-space-wolves.timing: Before a unit is selected to fight
imperium-space-wolves.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

imperium-space-wolves.name: Pack Hunters
imperium-space-wolves.timing: Before a unit is selected to fight
imperium-space-wolves.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, if your unit is within 6" of another friendly unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

imperium-space-wolves.name: Heroic Charge
imperium-space-wolves.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

imperium-grey-knights.name: Psybolt Ammunition
imperium-grey-knights.timing: Before a unit is selected to shoot
imperium-grey-knights.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 2 and the AP by 1.

imperium-grey-knights.name: Hammerhand
imperium-grey-knights.timing: Before a unit is selected to fight
imperium-grey-knights.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

imperium-grey-knights.name: Warp Shaping
imperium-grey-knights.timing: Before a unit uses a Psychic ability
imperium-grey-knights.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Psychic ability roll for that unit.

necrons.name: Emergency Protocols
necrons.timing: After a unit fails a Battle-shock test
necrons.effect: That unit does not lose the Living Metal ability this turn. At the end of the phase, remove all Battle-shocked markers from that unit.

necrons.name: Disruption Fields
necrons.timing: Before a unit is selected to fight
necrons.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

necrons.name: Quantum Shielding
necrons.timing: After a saving throw is failed for a VEHICLE unit
necrons.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2+, that attack's damage is reduced to 0.

necrons.name: My Will Be Done
necrons.effect: Select one friendly unit. Until the end of the turn, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

necrons.name: Relentless March
necrons.effect: Until the end of the phase, that unit can move an additional 3".

tyranids.name: Voracious Appetite
tyranids.timing: Before a unit is selected to fight
tyranids.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

tyranids.name: Spawning
tyranids.effect: Add up to 10 Termagant models to a Termagant unit from your army (this can take the unit above its Starting Strength). These models must be set up within Synapse range of a friendly Synapse unit and more than 9" from all enemy models.

tyranids.name: Metabolic Overdrive
tyranids.timing: Before a MONSTER unit is selected to fight
tyranids.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

tyranids.name: Hyper-adaption
tyranids.effect: Select one unit. Until the end of the battle round, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

orks.name: Waaagh!
orks.timing: Before an ORK unit is selected to fight
orks.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

orks.name: Dakka! Dakka! Dakka!
orks.timing: Before a unit is selected to shoot
orks.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, if an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is made, make one additional attack using the same weapon (this attack cannot generate further attacks).

orks.name: Mob Up!
orks.effect: Merge two BOYZ units that are within 3" of each other into one combined unit.

orks.name: Ramming Speed
orks.timing: After a VEHICLE unit makes a Normal Move or Advance
orks.effect: That unit can move through other models and terrain. Each model it moves through suffers D3 mortal wounds.

tau-empire.name: Strike and Fade
tau-empire.timing: After a unit has finished shooting
tau-empire.effect: That unit can make a Normal Move of up to 6" (it cannot Advance). It cannot shoot again this phase.

tau-empire.name: Point Defence Targeting Relay
tau-empire.timing: Before an enemy unit is selected to charge your unit
tau-empire.effect: Your unit can fire Overwatch as if it were your Shooting phase, even if it has already shot this turn.

tau-empire.name: For the Greater Good
tau-empire.timing: When an enemy unit declares a charge
tau-empire.effect: Select one T'au Empire unit that the charging unit is visible to. That unit can fire Overwatch at the charging unit.

tau-empire.name: Emergency Deployment
tau-empire.effect: A unit in Reinforcements can be set up anywhere more than 6" from enemy models.

chaos-space-marines.name: Dark Pact
chaos-space-marines.timing: Before a unit uses an ability
chaos-space-marines.effect: Add 1 to all Hit rolls for that unit until the end of the phase. At the end of the phase, roll one D6 for each model: on a 1, that model suffers 1 mortal wound.

chaos-space-marines.name: Veterans of the Long War
chaos-space-marines.timing: Before a unit is selected to shoot or fight
chaos-space-marines.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

chaos-space-marines.name: Despoilers
chaos-space-marines.timing: Before a unit is selected to fight
chaos-space-marines.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength and AP of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

chaos-death-guard.name: Putrid Detonation
chaos-death-guard.timing: When a DAEMON model is destroyed in melee
chaos-death-guard.effect: Roll one D6. On a 4+, each enemy model within 3" of the destroyed model suffers 1 mortal wound.

chaos-death-guard.name: Cloud of Flies
chaos-death-guard.timing: When a unit is selected as a target
chaos-death-guard.effect: Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot be selected as a target of ranged attacks unless it is the closest eligible target.

chaos-death-guard.name: Diseased Horde
chaos-death-guard.timing: Before a unit is selected to fight
chaos-death-guard.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, the attack has the [PLAGUE WEAPON] ability, inflicting additional mortal wounds on unmodified wound rolls of 6.

chaos-world-eaters.name: Blood for the Blood God
chaos-world-eaters.timing: Before a unit is selected to fight
chaos-world-eaters.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

chaos-world-eaters.name: Skulls for the Skull Throne
chaos-world-eaters.timing: After a CHARACTER enemy model is destroyed by a melee attack
chaos-world-eaters.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons of all friendly WORLD EATERS units within 6" until the end of the phase.

chaos-world-eaters.name: Berzerker Rage
chaos-world-eaters.timing: Before a BERZERKERS unit is selected to fight
chaos-world-eaters.effect: Until the end of the phase, that unit has the FIGHTS FIRST ability.

chaos-thousand-sons.name: Infernal Fusillade
chaos-thousand-sons.timing: Before a unit is selected to shoot
chaos-thousand-sons.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [PSYCHIC] ability. Each time a model in that unit makes an attack with a Psychic weapon, add 1 to the Damage.

chaos-thousand-sons.name: Sorcerous Pact
chaos-thousand-sons.timing: Before a unit uses a Psychic ability
chaos-thousand-sons.effect: Add 1 to the Psychic ability roll, and the ability's range is increased by 6".

chaos-thousand-sons.name: Warped Reality
chaos-thousand-sons.effect: That unit can move an additional 3" and can move through terrain and other models as if they were not there.

chaos-daemons.name: Daemonic Ritual
chaos-daemons.effect: Set up one DAEMON unit from your reserves anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" from all enemy units.

chaos-daemons.name: Warp Surge
chaos-daemons.timing: Before a unit is selected to fight
chaos-daemons.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

imperium-adepta-sororitas.name: Act of Faith
imperium-adepta-sororitas.timing: Before using an Act of Faith
imperium-adepta-sororitas.effect: Use this Stratagem to perform an Act of Faith as if it were the start of your turn, even if you have already used one this turn.

imperium-adepta-sororitas.name: Martyr's Blessing
imperium-adepta-sororitas.timing: When a SISTERS unit is destroyed
imperium-adepta-sororitas.effect: Roll one D6 for each enemy model within 6" of the destroyed unit. On a 4+, that model's unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

imperium-adeptus-custodes.name: Burst of Contempt
imperium-adeptus-custodes.timing: Before a unit is selected to fight
imperium-adeptus-custodes.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, it targets the lowest Save characteristic model first. Improve the AP by 2.

imperium-adeptus-custodes.name: Stoic Defender
imperium-adeptus-custodes.timing: When an objective marker is contested
imperium-adeptus-custodes.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 3 to the OC of all friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES models within range of that objective.

imperium-astra-militarum.name: Suppressive Fire
imperium-astra-militarum.effect: Select one enemy unit that lost one or more models this phase to attacks from that unit. Until the end of the enemy's next turn, that enemy unit cannot make Overwatch and must subtract 2 from its Advance and Charge rolls.

imperium-astra-militarum.name: Tank Shock
imperium-astra-militarum.timing: After a VEHICLE unit makes a Normal Move
imperium-astra-militarum.effect: Each model that your VEHICLE moved over suffers D3 mortal wounds on a 4+.

imperium-astra-militarum.name: Voice of Command
imperium-astra-militarum.effect: Select one INFANTRY unit within 12" of a friendly OFFICER model. That unit can make one of the following moves: Normal Move, Advance, or Hold Steady (even if it has already moved).

imperium-astra-militarum.name: Overlapping Fields of Fire
imperium-astra-militarum.timing: Before a unit is selected to shoot
imperium-astra-militarum.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in that unit can target enemy units that are within Engagement Range of friendly units.

genestealer-cults.name: Cult Ambush
genestealer-cults.effect: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit in Strategic Reserves can be set up anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy models.

genestealer-cults.name: Primed and Readied
genestealer-cults.effect: One HOST OF ASCENSION unit that Advanced this turn can still shoot this phase, but only with Pistol weapons and Assault weapons.

genestealer-cults.name: Return to the Shadows
genestealer-cults.effect: Remove one GENESTEALER CULTS unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. The unit cannot be in Engagement Range when this Stratagem is used. (Updated: now triggers at end of Fight phase.)

genestealer-cults.name: Tunnelling Claws
genestealer-cults.effect: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit in Strategic Reserves that has the ability to tunnel can be set up anywhere on the battlefield more than 3" from all enemy models.

genestealer-cults.name: Biosanctic Broodsurge
genestealer-cults.timing: Fight phase, when a unit is selected to fight
genestealer-cults.effect: Until end of phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, on an unmodified wound roll of 6, the target suffers 1 additional mortal wound.

genestealer-cults.name: Honour the Forebears
genestealer-cults.timing: Any phase, when a CHARACTER model is destroyed
genestealer-cults.effect: Until end of battle, GENESTEALER CULTS units within 6" of the point where that model was destroyed add 1 to their Attacks and Strength characteristics.

leagues-of-votann.name: Calculated Ferocity
leagues-of-votann.timing: Before a unit is selected to fight
leagues-of-votann.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack against a unit that has one or more Kin Tally tokens, add 1 to the Hit roll.

leagues-of-votann.name: Grimnyr's Curse
leagues-of-votann.timing: Before a unit is selected to shoot
leagues-of-votann.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to that unit. That enemy unit gains one Judgement token.

imperium-adeptus-mechanicus.name: Protector Doctrina Imperative
imperium-adeptus-mechanicus.timing: Before a unit is selected to shoot
imperium-adeptus-mechanicus.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the BS of ranged attacks made by models in that unit.

imperium-adeptus-mechanicus.name: Aggressor Doctrina Imperative
imperium-adeptus-mechanicus.timing: Before a unit is selected to fight
imperium-adeptus-mechanicus.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the WS of melee attacks made by models in that unit.

aeldari-craftworlds.name: Forewarned
aeldari-craftworlds.timing: When an enemy unit arrives from reserves
aeldari-craftworlds.effect: One AELDARI unit that can shoot can immediately make one ranged attack against the arriving unit, even though it is not your turn.

aeldari-craftworlds.name: Phantasm
aeldari-craftworlds.timing: Before an enemy unit declares a charge
aeldari-craftworlds.effect: One friendly AELDARI unit within 9" of the charging unit can immediately make a Normal Move of up to 6".

aeldari-craftworlds.name: Celestial Shield
aeldari-craftworlds.timing: When a GUARDIAN DEFENDERS unit is targeted
aeldari-craftworlds.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Save of models in that unit by 1.

chaos-emperors-children.name: Protection of the Dark Prince
chaos-emperors-children.timing: Any phase, when a unit is selected as a target
chaos-emperors-children.effect: Until end of phase, models in that unit have a 5+ Feel No Pain against mortal wounds, and a 6+ Feel No Pain against all other damage.

chaos-emperors-children.name: Deft Parry
chaos-emperors-children.timing: Fight phase, when an enemy unit is selected to fight
chaos-emperors-children.effect: Until end of phase, melee attacks that target one friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit within 6" of the bearer suffer -1 to their hit rolls.

chaos-emperors-children.name: Violent Crescendo
chaos-emperors-children.timing: Fight phase, when a SLAANESH INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit is selected to fight
chaos-emperors-children.effect: Until end of phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified hit roll of 6 scores 2 additional hits.

chaos-emperors-children.name: Ceaseless Onslaught
chaos-emperors-children.timing: Movement phase, when a unit disembarks from a RHINO
chaos-emperors-children.effect: That unit can declare a charge this turn even if it disembarked this phase.

chaos-emperors-children.name: Dark Vigour
chaos-emperors-children.effect: One non-BEAST, non-VEHICLE EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit can be placed into Strategic Reserves, even if the battle has started.

chaos-emperors-children.name: Capricious Reactions
chaos-emperors-children.timing: Opponent's Shooting phase, after an enemy unit has selected its targets
chaos-emperors-children.effect: Until end of phase, that enemy unit suffers -1 to its hit rolls against one friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN unit it has targeted.

chaos-emperors-children.name: Embrace the Pain
chaos-emperors-children.timing: Fight phase, when a friendly unit is selected as the target of a charge
chaos-emperors-children.effect: If two or more friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN units are in Engagement Range of the charging unit, redirect all attacks to one of those units of your choice.

chaos-knights.name: Infernal Crusade
chaos-knights.effect: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit performs a Malefic Surge: choose Unholy Hunger (+3" Move), Diabolic Power (Sustained Hits 1 or Lethal Hits), or Unnatural Fortitude (5+ invul save OR 6+ FNP — choose one).

chaos-knights.name: Runes of Disdain
chaos-knights.timing: Any phase, when a CHAOS KNIGHTS unit is selected as the target
chaos-knights.effect: Until end of phase, reduce the damage of all attacks made against that unit by 1 (minimum 1).

chaos-knights.name: Vow of Dominance
chaos-knights.timing: Fight phase, when a CHAOS KNIGHTS unit is selected to fight
chaos-knights.effect: Until end of phase, add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons used by models in that unit.

chaos-knights.name: Claimed for the Dark Gods
chaos-knights.effect: Select one objective marker within 12" of a friendly CHAOS KNIGHTS unit. That objective marker is treated as being controlled by you with an OC of 5, even if you have no models on it. This lasts until the start of your next Command phase.

chaos-knights.name: Marked Prey
chaos-knights.effect: Select one enemy unit. Until end of phase, each time a friendly WAR DOG unit makes an attack against that unit, re-roll hit rolls of 1.

chaos-knights.name: Full Throttle
chaos-knights.effect: One CHAOS KNIGHTS unit can Advance and still shoot ranged weapons this turn as if it had not moved.

imperium-imperial-knights.name: Shoulder the Burden
imperium-imperial-knights.timing: Any phase, when an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model would lose its last wound
imperium-imperial-knights.effect: Roll one D6: on a 4+, that model survives with 1 wound remaining.

imperium-imperial-knights.name: Squire's Duty
imperium-imperial-knights.effect: One ARMIGER unit that is not in Engagement Range can shoot after falling back this turn.

imperium-imperial-knights.name: Thunderstomp
imperium-imperial-knights.timing: Fight phase, when an IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit is selected to fight
imperium-imperial-knights.effect: Until end of phase, stomp attacks made by models in that unit double their Attacks and improve their AP by 1.

imperium-imperial-knights.name: Run Them Through
imperium-imperial-knights.timing: Fight phase, after a QUESTORIS ASSAULT unit completes a charge move
imperium-imperial-knights.effect: Select one IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit that charged this phase. Until end of phase, melee weapons used by models in that unit gain the [LANCE] ability. (Updated: affects 1 unit, previously 3.)

imperium-imperial-knights.name: Full Tilt
imperium-imperial-knights.effect: Select one IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit that has not yet moved. That unit gains +2" to its Move characteristic and +2 to Advance rolls this phase. (Updated: affects 1 unit, previously 3.)

imperium-imperial-knights.name: Tactical Foil
imperium-imperial-knights.timing: Opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit moves, advances, or falls back within 9" of a friendly IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit
imperium-imperial-knights.effect: That IMPERIAL KNIGHTS unit can immediately move up to D6".

imperium-imperial-knights.name: Heroic Stand
imperium-imperial-knights.timing: Fight phase, when a DEFENDERS OF THE REALM unit is selected to fight
imperium-imperial-knights.effect: Until end of phase, models in that unit have a 5+ Feel No Pain.

imperium-ultramarines.name: Courage and Honour
imperium-ultramarines.effect: One ULTRAMARINES unit automatically passes a Battle-shock test it is required to take this phase.

imperium-ultramarines.name: Tactical Withdrawal
imperium-ultramarines.effect: One ULTRAMARINES unit can Fall Back and still shoot and/or charge this turn.

imperium-ultramarines.name: Honour the Chapter
imperium-ultramarines.timing: Fight phase, when a ULTRAMARINES unit is selected to fight
imperium-ultramarines.effect: Until end of phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the hit roll.

imperium-ultramarines.name: Theoretical to Practical
imperium-ultramarines.effect: One ULTRAMARINES unit gains the benefits of a Combat Doctrine of your choice until the start of your next Command phase, even if that doctrine is not currently active.

imperium-ultramarines.name: Orbital Bombardment
imperium-ultramarines.effect: Select one point on the battlefield. Each unit (friend and foe) within 3" of that point suffers D3+3 mortal wounds on a 2+.

imperium-black-templars.name: Crusaders
imperium-black-templars.timing: Fight phase, when a BLACK TEMPLARS unit is selected to fight after charging
imperium-black-templars.effect: Until end of phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified hit roll of 6 scores 1 additional hit.

imperium-black-templars.name: Abhor the Witch
imperium-black-templars.timing: Any phase, when a PSYKER unit targets a BLACK TEMPLARS unit
imperium-black-templars.effect: Until end of phase, that PSYKER unit's attacks suffer -1 to their hit rolls against the target BLACK TEMPLARS unit.

imperium-black-templars.name: Vow of the Crusader
imperium-black-templars.timing: Fight phase, when a BLACK TEMPLARS unit is selected to fight
imperium-black-templars.effect: Until end of phase, models in that unit have a 5+ Feel No Pain.

imperium-black-templars.name: Zeal of the Initiate
imperium-black-templars.timing: Fight phase, when a BLACK TEMPLARS INFANTRY unit is destroyed
imperium-black-templars.effect: Before removing that unit, it can immediately fight as if it were your turn to do so.

imperium-black-templars.name: Armour of Contempt
imperium-black-templars.timing: Any phase, when a saving throw is failed by a BLACK TEMPLARS VEHICLE
imperium-black-templars.effect: The AP of that attack is considered to be 0 for that saving throw. Re-roll the saving throw.

imperium-black-templars.name: Devout Push
imperium-black-templars.timing: Your Movement phase, when a BLACK TEMPLARS unit ends a Normal Move, Advance, or charge move
imperium-black-templars.effect: Each enemy unit within 1" of that unit must take a Battle-shock test.
